_comment: Dated currency baseline (blind-corner item, dossier appendix): every time-sensitive fact the amplification stack relies on, with its last verification date and freshness budget. The regression gate fails when an entry exceeds max_age_days - re-verify against the named source and update 'verified'.

entries.fact: xAI chat-completions endpoint https://api.x.ai/v1/chat/completions, Bearer auth, OpenAI-compatible (adapters.py grok adapter)
OpenAI chat-completions endpoint https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions (adapters.py openai adapter); no default model id assumed
entries.source: platform.openai.com API reference (shape stable; model ids churn)

entries.fact: Reference-bar model id 'claude-fable-5' reachable via claude CLI (-p probe returned OK); 'fable-5' is NOT a valid id

Anthropic lineup: Fable 5 (claude-fable-5, GA 2026-06-09, most capable widely released = the reference bar) / Opus 4.8 (claude-opus-4-8) / Sonnet 5 (claude-sonnet-5) / Haiku 4.5, + invite-only Mythos 5. NO Opus 5 exists; latest Opus is 4.8. Knowledge cutoff Jan 2026

Adapter API surfaces (amplification/core/adapter-targets.md): xAI grok-4.5/grok-4.3 at api.x.ai/v1, OpenAI-SDK compat, reasoning_effort default high; OpenAI gpt-5.6 (alias gpt-5.6-sol)/gpt-5.6-terra/gpt-5.6-luna at api.openai.com/v1. Both keep /chat/completions (our portable path) while pushing a newer /responses API. Model IDs churn fast -- adapters take model explicitly, no hardcoded default
Grader-design grounding: prefer deterministic code graders, blind/ordinal/different-model LLM judges, balanced should/should-not-fire sets (README section 3)
